title: Add kernel version requirement for fuse-overlayfs
body:
/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

The fuse-overlayfs README says:

> Also, please note that, when using fuse-overlayfs from a user namespace (for example, when using rootless podman) a Linux Kernel > v4.18.0 is required.

#### How to verify it

Ran into this when trying to run with fuse-overlayfs on 4.8.0 -- doesn't work, throws an EINVAL -- see https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10100.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

No

```release-note
None
```

You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @cevich` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I don't like specific version checks, because they do not take into account back porting of fixes to kernel is distributions like RHEL and Centos.
I've submitted PR #3361 to remove the existing specific version number from the "Kernel Version Requirements" section.  This PR (#3295) should remain rejected if #3361 is accepted and vice versa.
My apologies, @stevegt!  Thanks opening the other PR.
